wiki.summary: Released on January 26 exclusively on SoundCloud. In this song, Lucy talks about his come-up and relevance, problems of racism, his problems with women. Cover is an art of Hatsune Miku, drawn in uncanny and yandere style by user Nekoyanagi Leo and uploaded to piapro.net (official Hatsune Miku web-site). Origin name of the art is “The songstress who turned into a demon of jealousy” (“嫉妬の鬼と化した歌姫”). This image of Hatsune Miku is highly associated with vocaloid lost media. Read more on Last.fm.
